name: ai-commit-assistant
description: Generate professional commit messages in seconds using 15 AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, MiniMax, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Perplexity, Z.ai, Mistral, Cohere, HuggingFace, Together AI, OpenRouter, Ollama, GitHub Copilot) and 50+ models. Zero setup options available.

enumDescriptions: Use Google's Gemini AI for generating commit messages
Use Hugging Face models for generating commit messages
Use local Ollama models for generating commit messages
Use Mistral AI for generating commit messages
Use Cohere AI for generating commit messages
Use OpenAI for generating commit messages
Use Together AI for generating commit messages
Use OpenRouter for accessing multiple AI models
Use Anthropic Claude for generating commit messages
Use MiniMax M2 for generating commit messages
Use GitHub Copilot for generating commit messages (no API key required)
Use DeepSeek AI for generating commit messages
Use Grok AI for generating commit messages
Use Perplexity AI for generating commit messages
Use Z.ai (GLM) for generating commit messages
Use Custom API endpoint for generating commit messages (Pro feature)
gitmind.apiProvider.description: Select which AI provider to use for generating commit messages

gitmind.debug.description: Enable debug mode to show detailed LLM responses and API interactions

gitmind.showOnboarding.description: Show the onboarding experience for new users. Disable this to permanently turn off onboarding. Can be re-enabled to allow manual access to the onboarding wizard.

gitmind.gemini.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for Google's Gemini AI [Learn more](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey)

gitmind.huggingface.model.markdownDescription: Model ID for Hugging Face. [Learn more](https://huggingface.co/models)

gitmind.commit.verbose.description: Generate verbose commit messages with detailed descriptions. When disabled, only generates the summary line.

gitmind.commit.captureAllChanges.description: When enabled, GitMind captures both staged and unstaged changes (including untracked files) and will not prompt you to stage changes before generating a commit message.

gitmind.commit.targetLanguage.description: Select the target language for generated commit messages (Pro feature)
gitmind.commit.targetLanguage.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Select the target language for AI-generated commit messages. The AI will use professional developer terminology widely accepted in the selected language.

gitmind.showDiagnostics.description: Show model and token information before generating commit messages

gitmind.telemetry.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable extension telemetry to help improve GitMind. **Privacy First**: Only anonymous usage analytics are collected - no code content, file names, or personal information. You can disable this anytime while still respecting VS Code's global telemetry setting.

gitmind.telemetry.connectionString.markdownDescription: Azure Application Insights connection string for telemetry (optional). If not provided, the extension will use the default connection string. **Privacy Protected**: All telemetry data is anonymous and GDPR/CCPA compliant.

gitmind.gemini.model.description: Select which Gemini model to use
enumDescriptions: Gemini 2.5 Pro - Advanced model with 65,536 token output limit
Gemini 2.5 Flash - Fast and efficient with 65,536 token output limit
Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview - Preview version with 65,536 token output limit
Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite - Lightweight version with 65,536 token output limit
Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite Preview - Preview lightweight version with 65,536 token output limit
Command A (Latest - High Performance)
Command R (08-2024)
Command R+ (08-2024)
Aya Expanse 8B (Multilingual)
Aya Expanse 32B (Multilingual)
Command R7B Arabic
Command R (Legacy)
Command R+ (Legacy)
Command (Legacy)
Command Light (Legacy)
Command Nightly (Legacy)

gitmind.openai.model.description: OpenAI model to use for generating commit messages
enumDescriptions: GPT-4.1 - Latest model with enhanced capabilities
GPT-4.1 Mini - Efficient version of GPT-4.1
GPT-4.1 Nano - Ultra-efficient GPT-4.1 variant
o3 - Advanced reasoning model
o4-mini - Fast reasoning model
o3-mini - Efficient reasoning model
GPT-4o - Multimodal model with vision capabilities
GPT-4o Mini - Efficient multimodal model

gitmind.promptCustomization.enabled.description: When enabled, shows a dialog to add custom context when generating commit messages

gitmind.promptCustomization.saveLastProm.description: Save the last custom prompt and use it as default for next commit message generation

gitmind.promptCustomization.lastPrompt.description: The last custom prompt used (automatically managed)

enumDescriptions: Simple, straightforward commit messages
Conventional Commits standard with types and scopes (Pro)
Conventional Commits types without scopes (Pro)
Angular commit convention with detailed type definitions (Pro)
Ember.js style with tags and detailed descriptions (Pro)
Visual semantic commits with custom emojis (Pro)
Official gitmoji.dev specification with standardized emojis (Pro)
Automated release-optimized commits for semantic versioning (Pro)
Interactive guided commits with validation (Pro)
Google's strict enterprise convention with mandatory scopes (Pro)
Traditional kernel development convention with subsystems (Pro)
JavaScript project convention with issue tracking (Pro)
gitmind.commitStyle.style.description: Choose the commit message style for AI generation

gitmind.together.model.description: Together AI model to use for generating commit messages

gitmind.openrouter.model.description: OpenRouter model to use for generating commit messages
gitmind.openrouter.model.markdownDescription: OpenRouter model to use for generating commit messages. [Learn more](https://openrouter.ai/models)

gitmind.anthropic.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for Anthropic Claude [Learn more](https://console.anthropic.com/)

Claude Sonnet 4 - High-performance Claude 4 model
Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Most capable model with enhanced reasoning
Claude 3.5 Haiku - Fast and efficient for quick responses

MiniMax M2 Stable - Text generation model (stable)

DeepSeek Reasoner - Advanced reasoning model for complex problem solving

gitmind.custom.enabled.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Enable custom API endpoint for commit message generation

gitmind.custom.baseUrl.description: Base URL for custom API endpoint (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.baseUrl.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: The base URL of your custom API (e.g., https://your-api.example.com)

gitmind.custom.endpoint.description: API endpoint path for custom API (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.endpoint.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: The endpoint path for the chat completion API (e.g., /v1/chat/completions)

gitmind.custom.authType.description: Authentication type for custom API (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.authType.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Select the authentication method for your custom API

gitmind.custom.authToken.description: Authentication token for custom API (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.authToken.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Your API token or key (will be stored securely for Pro users)

gitmind.custom.headerKey.description: Header key name for API Key authentication (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.headerKey.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Header key name for API Key authentication (e.g., X-API-Key)

gitmind.custom.requestFormat.description: Request format for custom API (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.requestFormat.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Leave empty for OpenAI-compatible format, or provide custom JSON template

gitmind.custom.responseFormat.description: Response format path for custom API (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.responseFormat.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: JSON path to extract response (e.g., choices.0.message.content)

gitmind.custom.model.description: Model name for custom API (Pro feature)
gitmind.custom.model.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: The name of the model to use (as required by your API)

gitmind.pro.licenseKey.description: [LEGACY] Your GitMind Pro license key for accessing premium features
gitmind.pro.licenseKey.markdownDescription: **Legacy License Key**: For backwards compatibility only. New users should use the subscription system. [Subscribe to Pro](https://gitmind.com/pro) to enable encrypted API key storage and advanced features.

gitmind.pro.encryptionEnabled.description: Enable encrypted storage for API keys (Pro feature only)
gitmind.pro.encryptionEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable encrypted storage for API keys using VS Code's SecretStorage API. **Pro Feature**: This feature is only available for GitMind Pro subscribers. API keys are encrypted and stored securely, making them inaccessible to other extensions.

gitmind.pro.orderId.description: Your LemonSqueezy order ID for Pro activation
gitmind.pro.orderId.markdownDescription: Your LemonSqueezy order ID for activating GitMind Pro features. This can be found in your purchase receipt email.

gitmind.pro.validationStatus.markdownDescription: Current status of your Pro license validation. This is automatically updated when validating your license.

gitmind.pro.lastValidation.description: Last time license was validated (internal use)

gitmind.pro.instanceId.markdownDescription: The instance ID associated with your activated license. This is used for license validation and is automatically managed.

gitmind.pro.commitBodyOptions.enabled.description: Enable custom commit message body line limits (Pro feature)
gitmind.pro.commitBodyOptions.enabled.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Control the maximum number of lines in commit message body to maintain consistency and readability across your project. This feature is only available for GitMind Pro subscribers.

gitmind.pro.commitBodyOptions.maxLines.description: Maximum number of lines in commit message body (Pro feature)
gitmind.pro.commitBodyOptions.maxLines.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Set the maximum number of lines for commit message body. Controls how detailed the commit descriptions will be while maintaining readability.

gitmind.pro.commitLengthOptions.enabled.description: Enable custom commit message summary length limits (Pro feature)
gitmind.pro.commitLengthOptions.enabled.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Control the maximum length of commit message summary lines. Helps maintain consistency with your team's commit message standards.

gitmind.pro.commitLengthOptions.maxLengt.description: Maximum length of the commit summary line (first line)
gitmind.pro.commitLengthOptions.maxLengt.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Set the maximum number of characters for commit message summary lines. Standard Git recommendation is 72 characters, but you can customize this to fit your team's needs.

gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.mode.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Choose whether GitMind should decide generation parameters automatically (auto) or use your custom overrides (custom).

gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.temperat.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: When enabled and mode is set to custom, GitMind will send your specified temperature to supported providers.
**Pro Feature**: Sampling temperature. Higher values = more variation.

gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.topPEnab.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: When enabled and mode is set to custom, GitMind will send your specified top-p to supported providers.

gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.topKEnab.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: When enabled and mode is set to custom, GitMind will send your specified top-k to supported providers.

gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.topK.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Limits sampling to the top K tokens.

gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.maxToken.description: Enable custom max output tokens override (Pro feature)
gitmind.pro.advancedModelConfig.maxToken.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: When enabled and mode is set to custom, GitMind will send your specified max tokens / max output tokens to supported providers.
**Pro Feature**: Maximum number of output tokens the model can generate.

gitmind.pro.learnFromCommitHistory.enabl.description: Enable or disable the Learn from Commit History feature (Pro only)

gitmind.pro.learnFromCommitHistory.maxCo.description: Maximum number of commits to analyze when learning from commit history

gitmind.pro.learnFromCommitHistory.inclu.description: Include author and date information when analyzing commit history

gitmind.pro.changelog.enabled.description: Enable changelog generation from git history (Pro feature)
gitmind.pro.changelog.enabled.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Generate professional changelogs from git commit history. AI analyzes commits and creates industry-standard changelog documentation.

gitmind.pro.changelog.maxCommitsEnabled.description: Enable manual max commits limit for changelog generation
gitmind.pro.changelog.maxCommitsEnabled.markdownDescription: When disabled (default), GitMind automatically determines the commit range from your version tag selection (based on tag positions in history). When enabled, you can manually cap the number of commits considered to reduce token usage.

gitmind.pro.changelog.maxCommits.description: Maximum number of commits to analyze when generating changelog (only applies when NO version tags detected - with tags, ALL commits between tags are retrieved)
gitmind.pro.changelog.maxCommits.markdownDescription:
Maximum number of commits to analyze when generating changelog.

**Important:** This setting only applies to repositories **without version tags** (fallback scenarios). When version tags are detected, ALL commits between tags are retrieved to ensure complete version history.

gitmind.pro.changelog.groupByVersion.description: Group changelog entries by version tags

gitmind.pro.changelog.maxVersions.description: Maximum number of versions to process at once (limits token usage)
gitmind.pro.changelog.maxVersions.markdownDescription: Maximum number of version tags to process in a single changelog generation. Lower values reduce token usage and improve AI accuracy. Recommended: 5-10 versions.

gitmind.pro.changelog.versionOrder.description: Order of versions in generated changelog
gitmind.pro.changelog.versionOrder.markdownDescription:
**newest-first**: Latest versions appear at the top (recommended for CHANGELOG.md)

**oldest-first**: Oldest versions appear at the top

gitmind.pro.changelog.overwriteExisting.description: Overwrite existing version entries when updating changelog
gitmind.pro.changelog.overwriteExisting.markdownDescription:
**Pro Feature**: When enabled, regenerating a changelog version will overwrite the existing entry. When disabled (default), existing versions are preserved and only new versions are added.

**Use Cases:**
- **Enabled**: Regenerate and improve existing version entries, fix formatting issues, or update descriptions
- **Disabled (Safe Mode)**: Never lose manually written changelog entries, only add new versions

gitmind.commitStyle.gitmoji.enabled.description: Enable gitmoji emojis for commit messages (Pro feature)
gitmind.commitStyle.gitmoji.enabled.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Add gitmoji emojis to your commit messages. This feature is only available for GitMind Pro subscribers.

gitmind.commitStyle.gitmoji.placement.description: Where to place gitmoji emojis in commit messages (Pro feature)
enumDescriptions: Add emojis only to the summary line
Add emojis only to the body
Add emojis to both summary and body
gitmind.commitStyle.gitmoji.placement.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Choose where gitmoji emojis should appear in your commit messages.

gitmind.commitStyle.gitmoji.customEmojis.description: Custom emoji mappings for commit types (Pro feature)
gitmind.commitStyle.gitmoji.customEmojis.markdownDescription: **Pro Feature**: Define custom emojis for specific commit types. Format: `{"feat": "✨", "fix": "🐛"}`. Leave empty to use default gitmoji mappings.

gitmind.subscription.email.description: Your email address for GitMind Pro subscription management
gitmind.subscription.email.markdownDescription: Your email address associated with your GitMind Pro subscription. This is used to validate your subscription status and access premium features.

gitmind.subscription.plan.markdownDescription: Your current GitMind subscription plan (free, pro-monthly, pro-yearly). This is automatically updated based on your subscription status.

gitmind.subscription.status.markdownDescription: Your current subscription status (active, paused, expired, cancelled). This is automatically updated based on your subscription status.

gitmind.subscription.lastChecked.description: Last time subscription status was checked (internal use)

gitmind.environment.LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY.description: Lemon Squeezy API key for subscription management

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint

untrustedWorkspaces.description: This extension requires API keys to be configured for full functionality.

telemetry.description: This extension collects anonymous usage data to improve functionality. No code content or personal information is collected.
